title: Score Distribution - Impulsive / Planning
description: Boxplot of probe scores for positive (planning) and negative (impulsive) evaluation texts at best layer 13. One score per eval text. Scores flipped for intuitive direction. Mann-Whitney U test on 20 vs 20 independent scores.

statistics.note: Each eval text produces one independent score at the best layer. Mann-Whitney U compares n_high vs n_low independent scores.
